## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing the feature. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? What use case does it enable? -->

<!-- Describe the approach. Include file paths, API surfaces, or architecture changes if known. -->

## Component

<!-- Which part of the project does this affect? -->

- [ ] New tool (`tools/`)
- [ ] Existing tool enhancement
- [ ] Python SDK (`lib/python/`)
- [ ] Go SDK (`lib/go/`)
- [ ] TypeScript SDK (`lib/typescript/`)
- [ ] New SDK language
- [ ] CI template (`platform/`)
- [ ] Local dev environment (`dev/`)
- [ ] Bootstrap scripts (`bootstrap/`)
- [ ] OPA policies
- [ ] Compliance mapping
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Architecture / design
